---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report inaccurate or missing documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
---

## Document

Which file(s)? Example: `README.md`, `docs/architecture.md`.

## Problem

- [ ] Inaccurate command or example
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Overclaims security
- [ ] Other

## Suggested fix

Describe the correction. Do not paste AI chat transcripts or working prompts.

## Verification

How can a reader confirm the fix? Example: `make demo`, specific test name.
